form.formComment: Jumps from box 1 for the first time after placing latest at Q Lakeside (20.05) in a Grade 5. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at his last couple of starts, most recently at Q Lakeside over 352m. Has claims on best form.

form.formComment: Impressive performance to score by one length in a Grade 5 last start at this track, clocking a slick 16.54 over the 300m trip. Has the ability and looks a key chance.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th on April 16 over 520m at Q Parklands behind Zipping Mehary beaten 8 lengths (30.62) in a Restricted WIN. Around the mark two starts back. Winning chance on that form.

form.formComment: Finished off last campaign with a eighth (17.18) in a GR 5 at this track. Makes return after a four-and-a-half months break. Has had two fresh up runs and has recorded the one placing. Will need some luck to feature.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by 2.75 lengths at this track over 300m (16.65) beating Beer Battered in Grade 6 on April 6. Makes plenty of appeal on the back of the latest win.
